element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Cheese bits gate access to later stages via cheat/warp system
Theater → Junk Yard → Toy Store → House (boss)
Optional advanced mechanic for sequence breaking

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Generic arcade-style platformer rhythm with incremental difficulty across themed worlds; three-stage-per-world structure suggests wave-based tension escalation

difficulty_curve.early_game: Theater stages establish baseline platforming and resource collection mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Junk Yard introduces environmental complexity; Toy Store maintains or escalates hazard density
difficulty_curve.late_game: House world culminates with boss encounter (Boss 4); difficulty ramp before final challenge
notable_spikes: Transition from Theater to Junk Yard (world 2 introduces new environment hazards)

notable_level_patterns.description: Four distinct themed worlds (Theater, Junk Yard, Toy Store, House), each with 3 standard stages plus boss stage in final world. Stage count: 12 total (3×4 standard stages + 1 boss).
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Theater: Stage 1 → Theater: Stage 2 → Theater: Stage 3 → [Junk Yard progression]

notable_level_patterns.description: Cheese bits serve as collectible currency; hidden warp cheat requires accumulated cheese count to access later stages directly, suggesting optional content gating system
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All stages contribute to cheese accumulation pool

notable_level_patterns.description: Hearts and lives are limited resources; cheats reveal system allows 99 lives and 99 hearts at max, but standard play requires resource conservation

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - Tom & Jerry SNES page)
